reviews.review_description:
The admins of this game banned me from this discord, after I exposed them hiring minors under 13 as mod. This game isn’t safe, and they do not like accountability.

They hire gullible kids, offering perks like badges and “fame.” They defend it when you expose the devs hanging out with kids under 13. And parents
Do not trust this game.

developer_response.body:
False. We have no mods under 13. You were banned from Discord for invasion of privacy, entitled attitude, and creating a highly toxic environment on Discord. Your intolerable level of disrespect for the community is exactly what they're being protected from. You did not enter the community with a voice of concern. You barged in with an attitude of blame and accusation.

You're definitely not the first person to ask about age, but you're the first person to be banned for it. I was genuinely worried about you bullying everyone in the community, and you are not allowed back.

Discord is a 13+ platform, and we follow those guidelines. Everyone given a role has stated that they meet the age requirements for Discord. Anyone found to be under 13 years old is removed from the Discord server and aren't offered a role in the game. This has happened multiple times. And we are especially careful with mods. It's stupidly impractical to believe we can do an ID check of everyone that enters Discord, and trying to do that just ruins the environment.

reviews.review_description: I love the game thank you for letting me play this game you guys did so well on it you guys it look like when you guys build the game it look like it took like 3 days to build it and I know that took a long time and I wanted to surprise you guys for something if I did I'll give you guys the iPhone 17 if I had too.

i this is a really good game for pvp combat it has a lot of promo codes too where you can get free cosmetics and i think it's a game you should download you can survive 99 nights in the forest you can build stuff and block haven and i've read the game five stars you can mind stuff and salad in the grinder and get gems and that's why i think it's a really good game that you should download

Dear review readers… don’t listen to these other people. Some people may not have fun playing the game. There are private lobby’s where you can get away from people if you’re non social, or just want to play with friends! I’m a moderator in this game and we actively try to get rid of people being toxic, swearing, etc. People say they’re “money hungry”, NOPE! In fact, most games have $30 bundles with an outfit, 10k coins, and an item. But here we do all that for just $25. The currency pricing is the exact same as everyone’s favorite vr games. $5 for 1000, $10 for 2200, yeah. And you can VERY easily get a LOT of money in 1 day btw… you can get like honestly a few thousand per day if you try hard. Also… they need money to keep servers alive, all I have to say is. If they’re asking for money, you don’t need to buy it. Stop calling them beggars, deal with it. There’s so many fun maps as well * cough cough* ANIMAL ROYALE *cough cough*.

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME i change my opinion
reviews.review_description: This game is super fun, with friends or without friends. This game have gorilla tag mechanics and a lot of gamemodes like a building one, there is a mine where you get diamonds and you can get new blocks and tools, a dark forest that you have to fight monsters, and the lobby, where you can buy cosmetics and more tools.   update: they got everything out of my account, even builds, im  not playing again until they give me everything back.

This game bring so much opportunities for me and my friends. There is literally endless possibilities when it comes to building. There is so many game modes and the dark forest is my favorite one because there is so much you could do like building bases, killing siren head, running away from monsters, ect. But this game comes with a couple of bugs. There not horrible or anything like that but, overall this game is awesome.

reviews.review_title: The game is so good I love to play it
reviews.review_description: It’s so fun when I play it I get so much friends in there and it’s so fun and I like to play with other people and the fun part is the game is like mine craft and I love playing Minecraft and I wanted to play it in vr but now I can and I like the fact of the monsters and they are scary

Ok overall, this game is wonderful. I just feel like lobbies should be a little more moderated. There are so many little kids who probably are still in kindergarten, and there are (rarely) people who say slurs a lot and don't get in trouble. Overall, this game is a wonderful thing despite everything.

I am a tester and content creator for this game, I really wish there was a more clean community and for people to respect each other. I'll be honest moderators are rare to find nowadays so toxicity is quite common sadly. Otherwise the game is fun and has many creative modes.

Nice game but should have level 1 mine cart's for free so people can ride the roller coaster and add cars to drive on the road and make the road bigger than make a build roulette so you can have build challenges and make no killing people in the free area in lobby 5 stars AMAZING

My 8 yr old son and I play this together and we have a blast! It’s cool watching him design and build. Parents: I encourage you to watch your kiddo build via them sharing their screen with you through the meta app on your phone if you don’t have another VR headset. See how their brain works through their “art” is worth every minute they’re on the VR. The vr doesn’t seem so pointless anymore. I used to get frustrated wanting him to play outside (still very important) The world is changing and it’s good to see our kids evolving right along with the tech

Animalblox is a Minecraft inspired game where multiple worlds are at you fingertips. Not only can you create structures to your heart content, but can also encounter and defeat monsters of various sizes. Overall I believe animalblox is a fun and entailing game.

I gave it a try and it is a really good game if you want something similar to [[Building game which shall not be named]] and dont want to go through the hassle of getting sidequest in order to do so. Nevertheless there are many kind people on the servers and it is a very social game if you're looking to make friends so give it a try if you haven't already!

Has good safety and report things and I love how you can fight other people! My favorite game is Monster Survival because I love shooting fighting and getting gems and coins! I guarantee anyone would like this game! Now it’s time to start my 5 week Animal Blocks phase!!!

developer_response.body: I have good news. There will be an update that toggles off PvP mode this month. Please link up with us in Discord, so you can see when this is launched.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! We're working hard to remove toxic players, and the repeat offenders tend to get removed very fast.

There are lots of ways to make coins in the game, so you can get the skins you want. Asking around will teach you the best way.
